FINAM JSC is not responsible for possible losses in case of transactions or investments in financial instruments mentioned in this information. The material is informational in nature and is not an offer of the mentioned instruments.

disclaimer.shortUpper: THE AI CHAT RESPONSE IS NOT AN INDIVIDUAL INVESTMENT RECOMMENDATION AND IS NOT AN OFFER OF THE MENTIONED INSTRUMENTS

survey.gateQuestion: There are a few more questions whose answers will help better configure the system for your preferences. Choose which option works best for you:
survey.gateAll: Ready to answer the remaining questions (approximately 4 minutes)
survey.gateThree: Let's do 3 more questions now, the rest later (about 1 minute)
survey.reminderQuestion: We remind you that you can continue the survey for more precise system configuration. Would you like to continue now?

welcome.heroDescription: Ask a question about trading, market analysis, or portfolio management. Choose a scenario below to see a sample conversation.

strategiesWidget.description: I can see you are interested in strategies. I can suggest the ones that fit you.

strategySurvey.title: Strategy picks
strategySurvey.portfolioOption: I want you to take my current assets from the portfolio

mock.triggerPhrase: I trade quite rarely and carefully
mock.triggerResponse:
I understand your situation. You trade rarely and carefully, but results are zero, while others earn on the same markets. Most likely it's about trading rhythm, entry points, or risk management — someone is simply more active entering/exiting or better at catching impulses.

Shall I find strategies that work with your assets but deliver results?
mock.step1Response:
Great! Let me first clarify which markets and instruments you want to earn on.

Select instruments
mock.step2Response: Great. Now let me clarify sectors. For {{instruments}}, are you interested in any of these?
mock.step3Question: What yield do you consider realistic for yourself when trading on your own?
mock.step4Question: What is the maximum account drawdown that is psychologically tolerable for you?
mock.step5Question:
Now I can do two things:

 1. Find strategies that trade the same markets/sectors as you (Russian stocks: banks + metallurgy, oil futures).

 2. First review your portfolio: see how you're currently trading and find authors who show better return/risk ratio on the same assets.

How would you prefer to start?
mock.step6Response:
Accepted: I'll show both "similar to you" and "different but more effective."

Based on your portfolio and given constraints (15–25% annual, DD up to 20%), I found 3 suitable strategies:

onboarding.step1: To ensure the AI chat works correctly, you need to complete a short survey of three questions.
onboarding.step2: This is your chat where you can discuss ideas and trades with AI. It has popular models connected that you can switch between, right here.
onboarding.step3: Our chat stands out from basic language models because it has many different tools built in.
onboarding.step4: If you're curious, you can always ask it 'What can you do?' and it will explain.
onboarding.step5: Here you can learn from examples and get useful tips to improve your projects.
onboarding.step6: You can also share your results and get feedback from other users.
onboarding.step7: Don't forget, we have plenty of documentation and guides for quick onboarding.
onboarding.step8: And of course, if you have any questions, you can always reach out for support.

scene2.title: THIS IS YOUR AI CHAT
scene2.step1: To ensure the AI chat works correctly, you need to complete a short survey of three questions.
scene2.step2: This is your chat where you can discuss ideas and trades with AI.
scene2.step3: It has popular models connected that you can switch between, right here.
scene2.step4: Our chat is not just a basic language model — it has many different tools built in.
scene2.step5: If you're curious, you can always ask it 'What can you do?' and it will explain.

scene3.title: CHAT INTERACTION
scene3.step1: Now let's discuss your question with the chat. For example: 'How is the MOEX market trading today?'
scene3.step2: Let's ask for information about a ticker you're interested in, for example 'What are Sber's support and resistance levels today?'
scene3.step3: Let's save this to your first space. Click the "Add to board" button.

scene4.title: BOARD INTERACTION
scene4.step1: The AI response has been saved to the board. Let's go there to take a look.
scene4.step2: This is your first infinite space. Your note with the AI response has already been saved here.
scene4.step3: You can add any information about a ticker using the toolbar.

scene5.title: ADDING A TICKER
scene5.step1: Choose a ticker you're interested in: news, fundamental indicators, and technical analysis signals.
scene5.step2: Add to the board. Information cards will be generated on your board

scene6.title: CARD INTERACTION
scene6.step1: You can send these cards to the AI chat and ask for its opinion by selecting one or more cards and clicking "Ask AI". The information stays in the chat, and you can return to discuss your ideas anytime

scene7.title: PORTFOLIO
scene7.step1: Go to the portfolio section and we'll add information about your portfolio.
scene7.step2: To add a portfolio, create your space with a portfolio and upload data from your broker. Then you can discuss this data with the chat. Just ask it "What's in my portfolio?".
